scripts.dev:clean: lsof -t -i:3000 | xargs kill -9 || true && turbo dev
scripts.db:rls:test:required: REQUIRE_RLS_INTEGRATION=1 REQUIRE_RLS_COVERAGE=1 node scripts/run-with-default-db-url.mjs pnpm db:rls:test
scripts.test:unit:domains: pnpm --filter @interdomestik/domain-ai test:unit && pnpm --filter @interdomestik/domain-claims test:unit && pnpm --filter @interdomestik/domain-users test:unit && pnpm --filter @interdomestik/domain-communications test:unit
scripts.test:coverage: node scripts/ci/clean-coverage-artifacts.mjs && pnpm --filter @interdomestik/web test:unit --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json --coverage.reporter=html --coverage.reporter=lcov --coverage.reporter=json-summary && pnpm --filter @interdomestik/domain-* test:unit --coverage --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json --coverage.reporter=html --coverage.reporter=lcov --coverage.reporter=json-summary

scripts.check:fast: node scripts/run-with-default-db-url.mjs pnpm e2e:state:setup && node scripts/run-with-default-db-url.mjs pnpm e2e:gate:pr:fast
scripts.check:static: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm type-check
scripts.check:all: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm type-check && pnpm i18n:check && pnpm i18n:purity:check && pnpm check:entrypoints:strict && pnpm test:unit:domains && pnpm test
scripts.sonar:start: docker compose --profile sonar up -d sonarqube db
scripts.sonar:stop: docker compose --profile sonar stop sonarqube db
scripts.sonar:full: pnpm type-check && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm sonar:scan
scripts.pr:verify: pnpm test:release-gate && pnpm db:migrations:check-journal && pnpm db:rls:test:required && pnpm i18n:check && pnpm i18n:purity:check && pnpm coverage:gate && pnpm check:fast && node scripts/run-with-default-db-url.mjs pnpm --filter @interdomestik/web run e2e:smoke
scripts.boot:e2e: pnpm seed:e2e && pnpm --filter @interdomestik/web test:e2e -- e2e/gate/seed-contract.spec.ts --project gate-ks-sq --project gate-mk-mk
